title: Build args does not resolves to stage when used within `FROM` when invoked with `--layers=false` or without `--layers`
body:
It seems buildah ignores checking stage alias names when invoked without `--layers`.

### Reproducer
```Dockerfile
ARG app_type

FROM alpine as x
RUN echo hello

FROM ${app_type} as final
RUN echo world
```

```console
buildah build -t test --build-arg app_type=x
```

Above build command prompts users to select image `x` from registry instead of resolving to stage names as `x`.
